title: potentilla × bellunensis
intro: Potentilla × bellunensis, also known as the Belluno potentilla, is a hybrid plant species within the Rosaceae family, resulting from the cross between Potentilla crantzii and Potentilla nitida. The medicinal properties of Potentilla × bellunensis have been observed to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin irritations, thanks to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. Herbal preparations of Potentilla × bellunensis can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in a variety of ways.
